name: X-1 GitHub Actions: scripts/ci-validate-all.sh runs with --help (CI entry script)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/ci-validate-all.sh" --help 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -le 2 ] && echo runs 1>&2 || (bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/ci-validate-all.sh" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -le 2 ] && echo runs 1>&2)
